title: Creating a custom field type is crashing UI
excerpt:
Howdy! 
I noticed that starting on Dec 11th, in the developer portal, trying to create or edit a field type that is backed by a dynamic list is causing the development UI to crash (rendering the “Oops something broke” gi…

posts.author: mdgale (Matt Gale)
posts.cookedHtml:
Howdy!
I noticed that starting on Dec 11th, in the developer portal, trying to create or edit a field type that is backed by a dynamic list is causing the development UI to crash (rendering the “Oops something broke” gif).

It isn;t just an existing app thats doing it for me, I can create a brand new app, create a feature and add a field type and it crashes immediately.

Anyone else experiencing this?

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am experiencing this too. I have a case open with appsupport@monday.com. If you send something in, reference ticket 3107151 as thats mine, so they can link them as the same issue.

I can reproduce it in multiple accounts. I know one other user that is experiencing the same in one of those accounts.

For reference I am using Brave browser, with the shields turned off on monday.com pages. Only one other extension (password manager) installed.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @mdgale,

Please send us an email to appsupport@monday.com and mention @anon29275264 's ticket 3107151 so that our team knows it could be connected to that issue

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: mdgale (Matt Gale)
posts.cookedHtml:
Done.

On a total tangent, I think this is at least the 2nd thread where I ask a question, @anon29275264 comes in with a recommendation and Matias finishes off with a “please email support”.
I appreciate you both! <3

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: And I don’t even work for monday!

posts.author: mdgale (Matt Gale)
posts.cookedHtml: A fix has been deployed and this is working now!

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
@mdgale Totally get what you’re saying! Internally, we use tickets for any requests that might be account-specific or are bugs, and sending an email to appsupport@monday.com automatically creates that ticket in our system.

Apologies for the extra step, but I agree - we appreciate @anon29275264 and @Matias.Monday’s help!

Thanks for the update - glad the fix is working for you!

Best,
Rachel

posts.author: mdgale (Matt Gale)
posts.cookedHtml:
All good!
And BTW that was not at all meant to be an irritation or nit-pick, just a funny observation.
